races.name: Kouniklos
races.description: Kouniklos are small, rabbit-like humanoids known for their intense energy, incredible speed and sharp senses. Reaching adulthood at only 2 years old and living an average of 25, they live life at a different pace than most mortals in Faleria.

feat_kouniklo_ability_increase.name: Kouniklos' Ability Score Increase
feat_kouniklo_ability_increase.description: You may choose to increase an ability score by 2 and one other ability score by 1 or increase three different ability scores by 1. Your Dexterity score maximum is 22, instead of the normal 20.

feat_kouniklo_hare_trigger.name: Hare-Trigger
feat_kouniklo_hare_trigger.description: You can add your proficiency bonus to your initiative rolls.

feat_kouniklo_leporine_senses.name: Leporine Senses
feat_kouniklo_leporine_senses.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

feat_kouniklo_lucky_footwork.name: Lucky Footwork
feat_kouniklo_lucky_footwork.description: When you fail a Dexterity saving throw, you can use your reaction to roll a d4 and add it to the save, potentially turning the failure into a success. You can't use this reaction if your speed is 0.

feat_kouniklo_rabbits_foot.name: Rabbit's Foot
feat_kouniklo_rabbits_foot.description: Once per long rest, when you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

feat_kouniklo_rabbit_hop.name: Rabbit Hop
feat_kouniklo_rabbit_hop.description: As a bonus action, you can make a horizontal jump equal to your movement speed or a vertical jump equal to half your movement speed, without provoking opportunity attacks. You can use it a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
